Settings.TimescaleHint: Multiplies the speed of the dice animation.
Settings.TimeUntilDisappearanceHint: Number of seconds until a die disappears after the roll is done.
Settings.WaitForRollHint: Requires LibWrapper. Wait for the dice animation to finish before releasing the roll.
Settings.MaxWaitTimeHint: If waiting for roll, the maximum duration to wait if the dice roll takes too long.
Settings.ThrowImpulseHint: Intensity of the impulse at which dice are thrown.
Settings.DisableForUserHint: Do not show 3D dice for your rolls. Other users' rolls are still played.
Settings.MaxFramerateHint: Framerate cap for the 3D dice canvas. Leave empty for uncapped.
Settings.DiceSizeHint: The size of the dice on screen.
Settings.MaxDiceOnScreenHint: The maximum number of dice at a time. Extra dice will be culled. Leave empty for no limit.
Settings.ImmersiveEnvironmentHint: Use the game canvas for environmental reflections. Can affect performance.
Settings.ShadowMapResolutionHint: The resolution of the shadow map. Higher values mean sharper shadows.
Settings.SoundVolumeHint: Volume of sounds when dice are rolling.
Settings.HighlightOwnDiceHint: Add an outline to your own dice.
Settings.BloomStrengthHint: Adjust the strength of the bloom effect.
Settings.BloomThresholdHint: Minimum light value to apply bloom.

preset.label: Apply Preset
preset.hint: Apply a preset to this element.

usePlayerColor.label: Use Player Color
usePlayerColor.hint: Use the color defined in user config.

colorMap.label: Color Map
colorMap.hint: Texture to apply to the dice.

transparent.label: Transparent
transparent.hint: Is the material transparent? Opacity and color map alpha will be used.

roughness.label: Roughness
roughness.hint: How rough the surface is. Values too low may cause excess brightness.

roughnessMap.label: Roughness Map
roughnessMap.hint: Control the roughness using a texture.

metalness.label: Metalness
metalness.hint: Whether the surface is made of metal

metalnessMap.label: Metalness Map
metalnessMap.hint: Control the metalness using a texture.

emissiveColor.label: Emissive Color
emissiveColor.hint: Color for emitting light from the material.

emissiveIntensity.label: Emissive Intensity
emissiveIntensity.hint: Amount of light produced by the emissive.

emissiveMap.label: Emissive Map
emissiveMap.hint: Control the emissive using a texture.

normalMap.label: Normal Map
normalMap.hint: Texture to add details affecting the lighting.

normalScale.label: Normal Scale
normalScale.hint: Intensity of the effect of the normal map.

emissiveColor.label: Emissive Color
emissiveColor.hint: Emissive color for the text labels.

bump.label: Bump
bump.hint: Height of the bump made by the text. Negative numbers cause a crease instead.

symbols.label: Symbols
symbols.hint: Define images to replace certain labels.

scale.label: Scale
scale.hint: Change the size of the image.

applyColor.label: Apply Color
applyColor.hint: Apply the text color to the image.
